summary: First-build testing of Phoneme-Mon PWA. Tested boot screen, DiegeticInstall flow, mode select, gender toggle, and backend APIs. AudioWorklet/Speech Synthesis cannot be fully tested in headless mode as expected.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking SOLO/PASS&PLAY, the oracle_select phase (showing BURST/FLOW/TONE options) is gated behind speech synthesis callback. In headless/no-audio environments, the phase never advances past 'rules'. This is expected behavior but blocks further automated testing of calibration and battle screens.

issues: Very low contrast text - 'SELECT MODE' label and descriptions use rgba(255,255,255,0.2-0.3) on near-black background, barely readable
Very dim UI elements on black background - intentional aesthetic but may cause accessibility issues

action_items: Consider adding a UI fallback for oracle_select phase to allow clicking BURST/FLOW/TONE buttons directly (in addition to voice detection) so users can proceed without mic, and for testing purposes
Consider adding data-testid to CalibrationScreen phoneme labels and progress dots for future testability
critical_code_review_comments: DiegeticInstall.js: oracle_select phase advancement is 100% dependent on Web Speech Synthesis callback completing. If speech synthesis fails silently (browser policy, no voices loaded), user is permanently stuck in 'rules' phase with no fallback UI to advance
App.js is large but manageable at ~300 lines - acceptable
Backend server.py: only 2 meaningful endpoints (scores POST/GET). Minimal but functional for the use case
No timeout fallback in startRules: if oracle.speak() callback never fires, user is stuck forever in 'rules' phase
seed_data_creation: Created test score via POST /api/scores: id=29843fc3, player_title=TEST_Champion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Boot screen: PASS (PHONEME-MON title, TOUCH TO LINK both visible). Click transitions to DiegeticInstall: PASS. SOLO/PASS&PLAY buttons: PASS. Gender toggle FEMALE→MALE: PASS. Oracle narration display shown after mode click: PASS. oracle_select (BURST/FLOW/TONE) phase cannot be tested headlessly - gated by speech synthesis. Backend /api/ health: PASS. POST /api/scores + GET /api/scores: PASS. Calibration/Battle/EndGame screens untested due to speech synthesis gate.
rca_of_issues: DiegeticInstall oracle_select gate: startRules() sets phase to 'oracle_select' inside oracle.speak() onEnd callback. In headless environments speech synthesis either fails silently or never fires callback, leaving app permanently in 'rules' phase showing only the oracle text '_'. Mitigation: add a setTimeout fallback (e.g. 10s) to force-advance to oracle_select, or add a tap-to-advance UI element.
